title: Prof. Dmitri Trenin “Unlike in 1962...the new nuclear crisis will not happen over there”
description: Prof. Dmitri Trenin, Academic Supervisor of the Institute of World Military Economy and Strategy at the Higher School of Economics University (HSE), Russia, in his speech titled "A New Global Security System" to the Schiller Institute Conference in Berlin July 12, laid out a grim picture to the attendees. He warned that the stream of events has led to the imminent threat of nuclear war, unless in the final hour we can organize "a joint effort to achieve an agreement that will stick."
